DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANTS CAL INSURANCE & ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES, FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IN ACCORDANCE WITH STATEMENT OF COMPLIANCE IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION EXCEPT AS TO INTERROGATORY NUMBERS 24 AND 25 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NUMBERS 19, 20, 22, AND 26. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO INTERROGATORY NUMBES 24 AND 25 AS IRRELEVANT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NUMBERS 19, 20, AND 22 AS THERE IS A RIGHT TO PRIVACY AND THE PROTECTION OFFERED TO TAX RETURNS AND DOCUMENTS. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO NUMBER 26 AS IT IS IRRELEVANT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, And Production Of Documents In Accordance With Statement Of Compliance, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Guy D. Borges, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Cal Insurance & Asociates
George Dowell, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Bostwick & Associates, PC

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendants Cal Insurance & Associates, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, And Production Of Documents In Accordance With Statement Of Compliance is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as Plaintiff does not oppose the motion except as to Interrogatory Numbers 24 and 25 and Request For Production Numbers 19, 20, 22, and 26. The motion is denied as to Interrogatory Numbes 24 and 25 as irrelevant. The motion is denied as to Request For Production Numbers 19, 20, and 22 as there is a right to privacy and the protection offered to tax returns and documents. The motion is denied as to Number 26 as it is irrelevant. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
